description: This Java class defines a REST controller for authentication endpoints in a Spring Boot application, handling user registration, login, token refresh, and logout via JWT cookies or tokens.

classes.name: AuthController
classes.description: Spring REST controller handling JWT-based authentication endpoints such as registration, login, token refresh, and logout.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Handles user registration, creates a new applicant, and returns user info.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Authenticates user credentials and returns access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Refreshes JWT tokens, returning new access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Revokes the refresh token and logs out the user.
